title: Drive a failing verify command to green (run → verify → continue)
task: The test suite for the RPN evaluator in src/rpn.js is failing. Two things are wrong: subtraction pops its operands in the wrong order, and division ("/") is not implemented. Fix src/rpn.js so the suite passes. Do NOT edit the tests. Run `npm test` and keep iterating until it is green.
notes: Mirrors the auto-loop's success criterion (packages/core/src/agent/auto-loop.ts): a `command_succeeds` verify gate that stays RED until the work is done, so the harness grades exactly what the loop would terminate on (status "passed"). The file_contains/file_not_contains pins are anti-reward-hacking guards so the agent cannot satisfy `npm test` by editing/skipping the tests instead of fixing the code. For a true multi-iteration loop run use the core auto-loop with verifyCommand "npm test".
